description: A conforming value inhabits a named-shape refinement type across a function boundary (§53.9). setEmail(addr) declares a refined parameter string(email). Calling setEmail(@email) passes @email = "user@example.com", a value that SATISFIES the email shape, so the compiler-generated boundary check succeeds and the assignment applies (@display -> "user@example.com"). The string-shape sibling of refinement-inhabit-rt (numeric) and the conforming counterpart of string-shape-literal-violation-pos.
rationale: §53.9.1 a refined function parameter carries a boundary check; a conforming argument ("user@example.com", satisfying the email shape) passes the check and the body runs, applying @display = "user@example.com".
